---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a broken link, display issue, or incorrect behavior on the site
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of what is broken or behaving incorrectly.

## Page URL
The specific page where the issue occurs (e.g., `https://expertnetworks.net/compare`).

## Expected Behavior
What should happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens.

## Environment
- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 122, Safari 17)
- **Device:** (e.g., Desktop, iPhone 15, iPad)
- **OS:** (e.g., macOS 14, Windows 11, iOS 17)

## Screenshots
If applicable, attach screenshots showing the issue.
